description_long: This chair features a cantilevered design with a continuous Z-shaped frame, constructed primarily from engineered wood with a visible chipboard texture. The seat and backrest are composed of evenly spaced wooden slats, providing both structural support and a visually striking striped pattern. The chair's base is flat and wide, ensuring stability, while the backrest is upright and rectangular, offering ergonomic support. The front and rear faces of the chair display a solid black panel, contrasting with the natural wood finish of the rest of the structure. The overall aesthetic is modern and minimalist, suitable for urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or contemporary waiting areas. The chair lacks armrests and has a robust, industrial appearance.
description: A modern, cantilevered chair made of chipboard with slatted seat and backrest, featuring black accent panels and a minimalist Z-shaped frame.
description_view_0: Side view showing the Z-shaped cantilevered frame and slatted seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the upright backrest, slatted seat, and solid black front panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the Z-shaped profile and slatted construction.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the solid chipboard backrest and black rear panel.
